justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preference for Monday afternoon and then accurately processed the follow-up request for Wednesday, June 3rd, around 3pm.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: When the initial request for Monday was unavailable, the agent proactively offered alternative days (Tuesday or Wednesday) and then found a suitable time on Wednesday close to the user's preferred time.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just three turns, without any redundant questions or API calls.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding and fulfilling the user's requests, leading to a positive customer experience.
